questions.question: The SI unit of solid angle is:
questions.explanation: Steradian (sr) is the SI unit of solid angle, while radian (rad) is the SI unit for plane angles.
questions.subject: Physics

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a base unit in SI?
questions.explanation: Joule is a derived unit (kg⋅m²/s²). The seven base units are meter, kilogram, second, ampere, kelvin, mole, and candela.
questions.subject: Physics

questions.question: The dimensions of gravitational constant G are:
questions.explanation: From F = G m₁m₂/r², G = Fr²/m₁m₂. Dimensions = [MLT⁻²][L²] / [M²] = [M⁻¹ L³ T⁻²].
questions.subject: Physics
